misc.title: рҹ’ҘгҖҢй»„жіүгҒ®гғ„гӮ¬гӮӨгҖҚTVгӮўгғӢгғЎж”ҫжҳ й–Ӣе§ӢиЁҳеҝөрҹ’Ҙ з¬¬1и©ұгӮҲгӮҠеҺҹз”»гӮ’еҲқе…¬й–ӢпјҒ гҒңгҒІгӮҲпҪһгҒҸгӮўгғғгғ—гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҹгҒ гҒҚ з№Ҡзҙ°гҒӢгҒӨеӨ§иғҶгҒӘжҸҸз·ҡгҖҒж§ӢжҲҗгҒ«гҒ”жіЁзӣ®рҹ‘Җ еҗ„й…ҚдҝЎгғ—гғ©гғғгғҲгғ•гӮ©гғјгғ гҒ«гҒҰй…ҚдҝЎй–Ӣе§Ӣрҹӣң yominotsugai.com/onair/ #й»„жіүгҒ®гғ„гӮ¬гӮӨ #гғЁгғҹгғ„гӮ¬
misc.text: рҹ’ҘгҖҢй»„жіүгҒ®гғ„гӮ¬гӮӨгҖҚTVгӮўгғӢгғЎж”ҫжҳ й–Ӣе§ӢиЁҳеҝөрҹ’Ҙ з¬¬1и©ұгӮҲгӮҠеҺҹз”»гӮ’еҲқе…¬й–ӢпјҒ гҒңгҒІгӮҲпҪһгҒҸгӮўгғғгғ—гҒ—гҒҰгҒ„гҒҹгҒ гҒҚ з№Ҡзҙ°гҒӢгҒӨеӨ§иғҶгҒӘжҸҸз·ҡгҖҒж§ӢжҲҗгҒ«гҒ”жіЁзӣ®рҹ‘Җ еҗ„й…ҚдҝЎгғ—гғ©гғғгғҲгғ•гӮ©гғјгғ гҒ«гҒҰй…ҚдҝЎй–Ӣе§Ӣрҹӣң yominotsugai.com/onair/ #й»„жіүгҒ®гғ„гӮ¬гӮӨ #гғЁгғҹгғ„гӮ¬

misc.title: йіҘеұұжҳҺе…Ҳз”ҹгҖҒгҒҠиӘ•з”ҹж—ҘгҒҠгӮҒгҒ§гҒЁгҒҶгҒ”гҒ–гҒ„гҒҫгҒҷрҹҺү жң¬еҪ“гҒ«зҙ ж•өгҒӘдҪңе“ҒгҒ®ж•°гҖ…гӮ’гҒӮгӮҠгҒҢгҒЁгҒҶгҒ”гҒ–гҒ„гҒҫгҒҷвңЁ гҒқгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒгӮўгғӢгғЎгҖҺDr.гӮ№гғ©гғігғ— гӮўгғ©гғ¬гҒЎгӮғгӮ“гҖҸгҒҜгҒ“гҒ®4жңҲ8ж—ҘгҒ§ж”ҫйҖҒй–Ӣе§ӢгҒӢгӮү45е‘Ёе№ҙгӮ’иҝҺгҒҲгҒҫгҒҷрҹ’«
misc.text: йіҘеұұжҳҺе…Ҳз”ҹгҖҒгҒҠиӘ•з”ҹж—ҘгҒҠгӮҒгҒ§гҒЁгҒҶгҒ”гҒ–гҒ„гҒҫгҒҷрҹҺү жң¬еҪ“гҒ«зҙ ж•өгҒӘдҪңе“ҒгҒ®ж•°гҖ…гӮ’гҒӮгӮҠгҒҢгҒЁгҒҶгҒ”гҒ–гҒ„гҒҫгҒҷвңЁ гҒқгҒ—гҒҰгҖҒгӮўгғӢгғЎгҖҺDr.гӮ№гғ©гғігғ— гӮўгғ©гғ¬гҒЎгӮғгӮ“гҖҸгҒҜгҒ“гҒ®4жңҲ8ж—ҘгҒ§ж”ҫйҖҒй–Ӣе§ӢгҒӢгӮү45е‘Ёе№ҙгӮ’иҝҺгҒҲгҒҫгҒҷрҹ’«

misc.title: #TalDГӯaComoHoy, hace 71 aГұos, nacГӯa Akira Toriyama, el genio japonГ©s que cambiГі para siempre la historia del manga y marcГі la infancia de millones de personas en todo el mundo. Con obras inolvidables
misc.text: #TalDГӯaComoHoy, hace 71 aГұos, nacГӯa Akira Toriyama, el genio japonГ©s que cambiГі para siempre la historia del manga y marcГі la infancia de millones de personas en todo el mundo. Con obras inolvidables como Dragon Ball y Dr. Slump, Toriyama no solo creГі personajes y aventuras: construyГі universos que nos enseГұaron a soГұar, a superarnos y a creer que siempre podemos ir un poco mГЎs allГЎ. Hoy queremos rendir homenaje a su legado recordando todo lo que nos hizo sentir. рҹ’¬ CuГ©ntanos: ВҝcuГЎl es tu personaje favorito creado por Akira Toriyama?

misc.title: PoPгҒ®гғӢгӮ«гғ«гғ•гӮЈе®ҹзү©иҰӢгҒҰгҒҚгҒҹпјҒйҖ еҪўгӮӮеЎ—иЈ…гӮӮгҒЁгҒҰгӮӮз¶әйә—гҒ§еұҠгҒҸгҒ®гҒҢж»…иҢ¶иӢҰиҢ¶жҘҪгҒ—гҒҝгҒ§гҒҷпјҒгғңгғӢгғјгҒЁгҒ®гӮөгӮӨгӮәж„ҹгӮӮзө¶еҰҷгҒ§дёҰгҒ№гҒҹжҷӮгҒ®ж„ҹеӢ•еҮ„гҒқгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷрҹҘ°рҹҘ°рҹҘ°рҹҘ°рҹҘ°
misc.text: PoPгҒ®гғӢгӮ«гғ«гғ•гӮЈе®ҹзү©иҰӢгҒҰгҒҚгҒҹпјҒйҖ еҪўгӮӮеЎ—иЈ…гӮӮгҒЁгҒҰгӮӮз¶әйә—гҒ§еұҠгҒҸгҒ®гҒҢж»…иҢ¶иӢҰиҢ¶жҘҪгҒ—гҒҝгҒ§гҒҷпјҒгғңгғӢгғјгҒЁгҒ®гӮөгӮӨгӮәж„ҹгӮӮзө¶еҰҷгҒ§дёҰгҒ№гҒҹжҷӮгҒ®ж„ҹеӢ•еҮ„гҒқгҒҶгҒ§гҒҷрҹҘ°рҹҘ°рҹҘ°рҹҘ°рҹҘ°

misc.title: Dragon Ball Complete Edition Double Color Box was released yesterday. The following mangaka illustrated each of the covers. рҹ§ЎVol. 1 Masakazu Katsura (Video Girl Ai), Vol. 2 Tatsuki Fujimoto (Chainsaw
misc.text: Dragon Ball Complete Edition Double Color Box was released yesterday. The following mangaka illustrated each of the covers. рҹ§ЎVol. 1 Masakazu Katsura (Video Girl Ai), Vol. 2 Tatsuki Fujimoto (Chainsaw Man), Vol. 3 Koji Inada (Dragon Quest: The Adventure of Dai), Vol. 4 Akira Amano (Reborn!), Vol. 5 Yoshihiro Togashi (Hunter x Hunter), Vol. 6 Hiroshi Shiibashi (Nura: Rise of the Yokai Clan), Vol. 7 Mikio Ikemoto (Boruto: Naruto Next Generations), Vol. 8 Sui Ishida (Tokyo Ghoul), Vol. 9 Kenta Shinohara (Sket Dance), Vol. 10 Shun Saeki (Food Wars!: Shokugeki no Soma), Vol. 11 Masashi Kishimoto (Naruto), Vol. 12 Yusuke Murata (One-Punch Man), Vol. 13 Kohei Horikoshi (My Hero Academia), Vol. 14 Tadatoshi Fujimaki (KurokoвҖҷs Basketball), Vol. 15 Tatsuya Endo (Spy x Family), Vol. 16 Hideaki Sorachi (Gintama), Vol. 17 Takehiko Inoue (Slam Dunk), Vol. 18 Naho Oishi (Dragon Ball: Episode of Bardock), Vol. 19 Mitsutoshi Shimabukuro (Toriko), Vol. 20 Yusei Matsui (Assassination Classroom), Vol. 21 Yoshifumi Tozuka (Undead Unluck), Vol. 22 Posuka Demizu (The Promised Neverland), Vol. 23 Kyosuke Usuta (Pyu to Fuku! Jaguar), Vol. 24 Masanori Morita (Rookies), Vol. 25 Kazue Kato (Blue Exorcist), Vol. 26 Boichi (Dr. Stone), Vol. 27 Tite Kubo (Bleach), Vol. 28 Osamu Akimoto (KochiKame), Vol. 29 Takeshi Obata (Death Note), Vol. 30 Nobuhiro Watsuki (Rurouni Kenshin), Vol. 31 Kentaro Yabuki (To Love Ru), Vol. 32 Koyoharu Gotoge (Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba), Vol. 33 Hirohiko Araki (JoJoвҖҷs Bizarre Adventure), Vol. 34 Yasuhisa Hara (Kingdom), Vol. 35 Hiroyuki Asada (Tegami Bachi), Vol. 36 Katsura Hoshino (D.Gray-man), Vol. 37 Shuichi Aso (The Disastrous Life of Saiki K.), Vol. 38 Ryuhei Tamura (Beelzebub), Vol. 39 Toyotarou (Dragon Ball Super), Vol. 40 Yuki Tabata (Black Clover), Vol. 41 Gege Akutami (Jujutsu Kaisen), Vol. 42 Eiichiro Oda (One Piece). [credit: Mr. GuernicaрҹҺҖ]

items.text: #TalDГӯaComoHoy, hace 71 aГұos, nacГӯa Akira Toriyama, el genio japonГ©s que cambiГі para siempre la historia del manga y marcГі la infancia de millones de personas en todo el mundo. Con obras inolvidables como Dragon Ball y Dr. Slump, Toriyama no solo creГі personajes y aventuras: construyГі universos que nos enseГұaron a soГұar, a superarnos y a creer que siempre podemos ir un poco mГЎs allГЎ. Hoy queremos rendir homenaje a su legado recordando todo lo que nos hizo sentir. рҹ’¬ CuГ©ntanos: ВҝcuГЎl es tu personaje favorito creado por Akira Toriyama?

items.title: Dragon Ball Complete Edition Double Color Box was released yesterday. The following mangaka illustrated each of the covers. рҹ§ЎVol. 1 Masakazu Katsura (Video Girl Ai), Vol. 2 Tatsuki Fujimoto (Chainsaw
items.text: Dragon Ball Complete Edition Double Color Box was released yesterday. The following mangaka illustrated each of the covers. рҹ§ЎVol. 1 Masakazu Katsura (Video Girl Ai), Vol. 2 Tatsuki Fujimoto (Chainsaw Man), Vol. 3 Koji Inada (Dragon Quest: The Adventure of Dai), Vol. 4 Akira Amano (Reborn!), Vol. 5 Yoshihiro Togashi (Hunter x Hunter), Vol. 6 Hiroshi Shiibashi (Nura: Rise of the Yokai Clan), Vol. 7 Mikio Ikemoto (Boruto: Naruto Next Generations), Vol. 8 Sui Ishida (Tokyo Ghoul), Vol. 9 Kenta Shinohara (Sket Dance), Vol. 10 Shun Saeki (Food Wars!: Shokugeki no Soma), Vol. 11 Masashi Kishimoto (Naruto), Vol. 12 Yusuke Murata (One-Punch Man), Vol. 13 Kohei Horikoshi (My Hero Academia), Vol. 14 Tadatoshi Fujimaki (KurokoвҖҷs Basketball), Vol. 15 Tatsuya Endo (Spy x Family), Vol. 16 Hideaki Sorachi (Gintama), Vol. 17 Takehiko Inoue (Slam Dunk), Vol. 18 Naho Oishi (Dragon Ball: Episode of Bardock), Vol. 19 Mitsutoshi Shimabukuro (Toriko), Vol. 20 Yusei Matsui (Assassination Classroom), Vol. 21 Yoshifumi Tozuka (Undead Unluck), Vol. 22 Posuka Demizu (The Promised Neverland), Vol. 23 Kyosuke Usuta (Pyu to Fuku! Jaguar), Vol. 24 Masanori Morita (Rookies), Vol. 25 Kazue Kato (Blue Exorcist), Vol. 26 Boichi (Dr. Stone), Vol. 27 Tite Kubo (Bleach), Vol. 28 Osamu Akimoto (KochiKame), Vol. 29 Takeshi Obata (Death Note), Vol. 30 Nobuhiro Watsuki (Rurouni Kenshin), Vol. 31 Kentaro Yabuki (To Love Ru), Vol. 32 Koyoharu Gotoge (Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba), Vol. 33 Hirohiko Araki (JoJoвҖҷs Bizarre Adventure), Vol. 34 Yasuhisa Hara (Kingdom), Vol. 35 Hiroyuki Asada (Tegami Bachi), Vol. 36 Katsura Hoshino (D.Gray-man), Vol. 37 Shuichi Aso (The Disastrous Life of Saiki K.), Vol. 38 Ryuhei Tamura (Beelzebub), Vol. 39 Toyotarou (Dragon Ball Super), Vol. 40 Yuki Tabata (Black Clover), Vol. 41 Gege Akutami (Jujutsu Kaisen), Vol. 42 Eiichiro Oda (One Piece). [credit: Mr. GuernicaрҹҺҖ]
